_comment: Curated universe for the Home dashboard 'Skeptical Money' (highest short interest) scanner. No data provider offers a market-wide short-interest ranking, so we scan this hand-maintained list of historically heavily-shorted, liquid US names and rank by % of float (top 10 shown). Review ~quarterly: drop delisted/low-short names, add newly crowded shorts. Tickers that return no short-interest data are silently skipped, so a slightly stale entry is harmless.
